task: Analyze the provided Git repository fixture and avoid unrelated same-file symbols.

issue.title: get_repo_analysis returns stale analysis after rebuild
issue.body: The stale result appears after api/services.py::get_repo_analysis delegates to _build_and_store_analysis. Do not inspect delete_share_token; it only shares the same file. github_repo/services.py is unrelated.

comments.body: The useful path is get_repo_analysis -> _build_and_store_analysis. The view and repository clone helpers are decoys.

tools.name: list_repo_files
tools.description: List bounded Python files in the provided repository.

tools.name: search_repo_symbols
tools.description: Search Python functions/classes in the repository and rank them against issue evidence.

tools.name: read_repo_file
tools.description: Read bounded Python file contents from the repository.
